# `x-sha256sum-matcher`

Compare two files by SHA256 hash


- **Usage**: `x-sha256sum-matcher [-v --verbose] [-h --help] <file1> <file2>`

## Arguments

### `<file1>`

First file

### `<file2>`

Second file

## Flags

### `-v --verbose`

Verbose output

### `-h --help`

Show help
